# solid-jsx-oxc vendor snapshot

This directory vendors the reference sources used while implementing oxide-dom's Rust-side JSX/TSX compiler.

Upstream: https://github.com/Frank-III/solid-jsx-oxc

Only the files relevant to the Solid JSX `generate: "universal"` runtime shape are mirrored here. The active compiler lives in `src/compiler.rs`; these files are retained as license-bearing reference material, not executed at runtime.
